content.query:
SELECT                      DISTINCT    [Part ID - Actual]
,                                       Brand
,                                       [Order ID]
,                                       Date
,                                       [Sales Qty]
,                                       SUM(Delivery2.IVQT) as [Total Invoiced Units]
,                                       SUM(CRAM) as [Total Freight]
,                                       SUM(CRAM)/NULLIF(SUM(Delivery2.IVQT),0) AS [Freight per Unit]
--,                                       CRAM/nullif([Sales Qty],0) as [Freight Charge per Unit]
FROM        a_SalesData     Sales
LEFT JOIN   M3.ODLINE       Delivery on Sales.[Order ID] = Delivery.ORNO and Sales.[Part ID - Actual] = Delivery.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.ODLINE       Delivery2 on Sales.[Order ID] = Delivery2.ORNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.OOCHRG       Charge on Sales.[Order ID] = Charge.ORNO and Delivery.DLIX = Charge.DLIX and Charge.CRID = 'FRE002'
WHERE       Sales.[Sales Type] = 'Sales'
AND         Sales.Company = 'M3'
AND         CRAM is not null
AND         CRAM > 0
GROUP BY        [Part ID - Actual], Brand, [Order ID], Date, [Sales Qty]
